title: rubus extensus
intro: Rubus extensus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayan region. This plant is rich in antioxidants and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus extensus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, lower blood pressure, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of Rubus extensus can be consumed as a tea, tincture, or supplement, and are also used in topical applications to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
